title: Visualize a Network Diagram
scenario: Create a prompt that instructs an LLM to generate a high-quality network diagram. The diagram should include a clear and simple layout, node labels, and edge labels. The output should be a PNG image.
constraints: Must use a graph layout algorithm
Must include a high-level description of the network

evaluationCriteria.description: The clarity and resolution of the generated image.
The use of consistent colors throughout the image, including node labels, edge labels, and background.
Whether the output adheres to all specified constraints.
